summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Business Development Dashboard. All 5 tabs (Dashboard, Branches, Lead Master, Google Sheet Connection, Lead Source) are functional. Backend APIs /api/v3/dashboard/bd-summary and /api/v3/lead-sources return correct data structures. BD role can create branches, manage sheet connections, and view leads. Qualify/Assign actions correctly restricted to pre_sales role.

minor.issue: BD role cannot qualify leads - returns 403. This is BY DESIGN per role permissions.
BD role cannot assign leads to branch - returns 403. This is BY DESIGN per role permissions.
Requires field mapping to be saved first before sync can run - returns 400 if mapping not configured. This is expected behavior.

issues: Hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' in lead select dropdown - non-blocking but causes console noise

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add business_dev role to qualify/assign-branch endpoints if BD should be able to perform these actions
OPTIONAL: Fix hydration warning in CRMPage.jsx lead select dropdown (span inside option element)
critical_code_review_comments: BD Dashboard component (BusinessLeadsDashboard.jsx) is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes
Backend endpoints /api/v3/dashboard/bd-summary and /api/v3/lead-sources correctly aggregate data
Role-based access control is properly implemented - BD can manage branches/sheets but not qualify/assign leads

success_rate.backend: 86% (18/21 tests passed - 3 failures are expected role permission restrictions)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 5 tabs functional, all UI elements present and working)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_BD_* branches, leads, and sheet connections during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: BD Dashboard fully tested on https://bizdev-dashboard.preview.emergentagent.com. Login: businessdev@fitsiomax.com / bd123. All 5 tabs working: Dashboard (metrics, pipeline, source/branch breakdown, recent leads), Branches (table + create form), Lead Master (table with filters, qualify/assign buttons visible but restricted), Google Sheet Connection (create + mapping + sync), Lead Source (aggregation table with stage breakdown). Backend role permissions correctly restrict qualify/assign to pre_sales role only.
rca_of_the_issue: No blocking issues found. The 3 backend test failures are expected behavior - BD role is intentionally restricted from qualify/assign operations which are pre_sales responsibilities.
mocked_api_status: Google Sheets OAuth is not live - sheet sync uses manual JSON payload as documented
